'''鈭歞-h-ch-j''' ('''kadahchejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:imparadise|imparadise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-h-ch-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imparadise|imparadise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-h-ch-j
|-
! Lemma
| kadahchejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidahchejoko|thidahchejoko]] || [[word:jidahchejoko|jidahchejoko]] || [[word:shidahchejoko|shidahchejoko]] || [[word:kidahchejoko|kidahchejoko]]

|-

|-
